objective: Chinese RenderMan 27 docs match official docs except language, with structure/layout/navigation/assets/search evidence and documented offline differences.

requirements.requirement: All official downloaded source pages have translated counterparts
Every unique source page is counted as translated and audited
No external MT service is referenced by project translation tooling
Static structure and shared theme invariants pass page-by-page

known_static_offline_differences: Official site uses dynamic Refined/Confluence page tree; local docs use static manifest order.
Official site search is dynamic; local docs use generated offline title/path/body index.
Official homepage video is a static local preview.
Downloader source/download metadata remains in HTML files but is hidden from the rendered reader view.

requirements.requirement: Browser visual sampling is complete for all translated pages
Confluence/internal links and resource sources are locally rewritten where expected
Search/read interaction works in local browser
Stage 3t remaining RU pages pass desktop and mobile rendered checks
Official live rendered spot checks still expose expected RenderMan/Refined shell signals

evidence: Official site uses dynamic Refined/Confluence page tree; local docs use static manifest order.
